'''Nessem''' was a [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]]. It was orbited by the modest [[Nessem Shipyards]].

{{Planet-stub}}
